indication: Adjuvant treatment of adult patients who are at significant risk of relapse following resection of Kit (CD117)-positive GIST.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved imatinib for reimbursement as a treatment option for the adjuvant treatment of adult patients who are at significant risk of relapse following resection of Kit (CD117)-positive gastrointestinal stromal tumors (GIST).

document.name: Imatinib Therapy - GIST. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
document.description: Imatinib Therapy - GIST, 2025, version number 4, NCCP National SACT Regimen, NCCP, viewed 26/03/2026, https://healthservice.hse.ie/documents/6727/335_v4_Imatinib.pdf

extensions.name: agent

value.name: Health Service Executive
value.description: Regulatory agency that approves medicines for reimbursement by the public health system in the Republic of Ireland.
